name: triphos-frontend-bootstrap
description: Triphos frontend bootstrap plugin with doctor, init, and plugin-local rules skills.

interface.shortDescription: Bootstrap and verify Triphos-standard frontend projects.
interface.longDescription: Install a Triphos-standard frontend bootstrap plugin with doctor, init, namespaced rules skills, template scaffolding, and validation helpers.
defaultPrompt: Use triphos-frontend-bootstrap to decide whether I should run doctor or init.
Use triphos-frontend-doctor to validate this Triphos plugin checkout.
Use triphos-frontend-init to scaffold a new Triphos frontend app.
